governance.title: Governance and clinical workflow
governance.requireSecondReviewerForCriticalFlags: Require second reviewer for critical flags
governance.showShadowModelOutputsToClinicians: Show shadow model outputs to clinicians
governance.modelVisibilityLocked: Live predictive model output remains hidden from normal clinical workflows.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.prototypeFraming: This app is a prototype for reference and training. It is not intended for direct clinical use.
disclaimer.acknowledgeHint: Confirm that you have read and understood the disclaimer

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted for reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets or sent to external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write role.
capture.offlineNotice: Offline submissions are queued with structured fields only and sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then review the structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Select or sign in to one active facility before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in the structured review payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed review workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences and session data are stored only on this device. Nothing is sent to external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent to configured services.

about.title: About
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype for reference and training. Not for clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support and advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, or determine ventilator settings.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against the patient, your facility workflow, and local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Required before continuing to clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device and will be synced when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Review the safety note before using AI Vent. The app can highlight missing data and uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible for patient care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in facility context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use the active facility and role shown by your session. Keep records within the correct facility workflow and follow local escalation, review, and approval procedures.

inputs.title: Entering inputs
inputs.body: Use Admit to enter available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Optional ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing optional data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a save blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations show advisory ventilator setting references with a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align with your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only and verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Monitoring and alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a recommendation, use Monitoring to log vitals and labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds and should be assessed according to local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Admit, advisory summaries, monitoring) works offline. Data is saved locally. Optional AI features require connectivity. When back online, continue as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume and oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory to expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Tidal volume (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, and pH, tied to a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance and verification state for a reference range. Only active approved or verified ranges are eligible for active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need review before dataset or training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue for review decisions, corrections, exclusions, and audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, or syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden from normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; enter SpO₂ and other vitals when available. For better matching, add PaO₂, PaCO₂, and pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using the app offline
offline.body: Admit, advisory summaries, and monitoring work offline. Data is stored locally. Optional AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not required for core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, pending, retired, rejected, and unverified ranges are not eligible for active decision-support display. Review the source, version, scope, and verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness help is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness and shadow-mode details are visible only to approved governance roles. Normal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs review
needsReview.body: Use the review queue to check submitted data, request correction, approve eligible records, or exclude records with an audit reason.

guides.home: Review facility context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, and records needing review before opening a patient workflow.
guides.admit: Capture the patient pathway and available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly and review backend-confirmed calculations after save.
guides.tracking: Use tracking to scan recent ventilation status and review needs. Read trend flags with source data and local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture for de-identified candidate records. Human review is required before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use the review queue to approve, request correction, or exclude records while preserving the audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards for aggregate quality, review, reference, and governance status. Avoid patient identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use settings for account, facility, accessibility, privacy, sync, and reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Review FiO₂ and PEEP; consider recruitment; check for shunt or V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Review minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation and perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols and clinical judgment.

ai.label: AI decision support
ai.enableHint: Use online AI for complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

emptyState.title: No items
emptyState.message: There are no items to display

welcome.title: Clinical workflow
welcome.message: Active facility, sync status, drafts, and review work are shown here.

reviewQueue.title: Review Queue
reviewQueue.subtitle: Validate submitted records, corrections, exclusions, reference ranges, dataset readiness, and sync conflicts.
reviewQueue.commentPlaceholder: Reviewer note, correction request, exclusion reason, or override reason

forbidden.title: Review access required
forbidden.message: An approved reviewer or governance role is required for this queue.

dataset.datasetApproved: Approved for dataset review boundary only; training export still requires governance approval.

states.error: Unable to load or save review queue.

datasetCapture.title: Clinical Data Capture
datasetCapture.subtitle: Enter de-identified clinical, ABG, ventilator, target-range, treatment, and outcome data for reviewer-approved model datasets.

notices.roleBlocked: This account does not have permission to submit clinical dataset candidates.
notices.offline: Offline mode is active. Structured captures will queue locally and sync when connectivity returns.

summary.facilityMissing: Select an active facility before submitting.

status.ready: Complete the required fields, then submit for reviewer approval.

patientReason.description: Capture the patient pathway, age, body metrics, and optional reason for support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record oxygen support, available ABG values, ventilator context, timestamps, device context, and uncertain values.

saveReview.description: Review the dataset recommendation, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override reason when needed, review status, and sync state.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: Enter clinical values and tap Next to generate a dataset recommendation.
saveReview.recommendationNeedsClinicalInputs: Recommendation needs clinical reason, SpO2, respiratory rate, and heart rate.
saveReview.clinicianConfirmed: Clinician confirms this admission record is ready for save review.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single name–value pair. Optional; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Name

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs or other metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used for trend analysis and monitoring after you start the session. Optional; you can add points later on the monitoring screen.
timeSeries.name: Name

recommendationSource.onlineAiDescription: Internet required; uses built-in when unavailable.
recommendationSource.modelHint: Select AI model (default used if not set)
